message:
feat(core): Rust SDK transport backend, connector registry expansion, and robot SDK contracts

robot_sdk_contracts.rs: New RustSdkTransport — canonical Rust transport
backend for generated robot SDK clients backed by watcher IPC RPC.
Implements get-text, send-text, state, search commands with typed
request/response structs.  Token-based auth support.

connector_registry.rs: Connector registry expansion with new
registration and lookup patterns.

connector_sdk.rs: SDK type additions.
ipc.rs: IPC client enhancements.
robot_types.rs: Robot type refinements.
Proptest coverage updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,7 +19,6 @@ fn arb_scoring_breakdown() -> impl Strategy<Value = SearchScoringBreakdown> {
         proptest::option::of(0.0f64..1.0),              // semantic_similarity
         proptest::option::of(prop_oneof![
             Just("hash".to_string()),
-            Just("model2vec".to_string()),
             Just("fastembed".to_string()),
         ]), // embedder_tier
         proptest::option::of(1usize..100),              // rrf_rank
